bio: Quality Engineering Specialist with a focus on aerospace and medical device manufacturing standards. I deliver robust quality systems and process improvements that reduce non-conformances and optimize production efficiency.
name: ABDULLAH CHOUDARY
title: Quality Engineering Specialist

community.description: Led campaign strategy and volunteer coordination, placing 4th of 14 candidates in a first-time campaign.

education.description: Mechanical Engineering program focused on design, analysis, and manufacturing processes.

highlights: Reduced recurring non-conformances by leading 8D root cause analysis and corrective actions.
Authored PFMEAs and Control Plans, ensuring part conformance through FAI per AS9102.
Drove In-Process Quality Control, reducing scrap and rework across SMT and PCBA operations.
experience.description: Manages supplier quality performance across 10+ suppliers, ensuring compliance and driving continuous improvement.

highlights: Produced validation reports (IQ, OQ, PQ) for various production machinery.
Supported teams assigned to CARs, improving corrective action implementation.
Amended work instructions for various departments, enhancing process clarity.
experience.description: Supported quality control across incoming, process, and outgoing operations, including supplier quality and RMA dispositions.

sloganHeroSection: Building compliant quality systems that minimize defects and maximize yield.
